title: SNDL Inc (SNDL) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Revenue and Strategic Growth Amidst Market Challenges
text: SNDL Inc reported strong financial performance for Q4 2024 and the full year, achieving record revenue and profitability metrics. The company generated $257.7 million in net revenue for Q4, representing 3.7% year-over-year growth, while full-year 2024 revenue reached $920 million. Key highlights include gross profit of $68.8 million in Q4 with a 26.7% margin—a significant 360 basis point improvement. The company achieved its first-time positive free cash flow of $9 million, surpassing guidance by $70 million compared to 2023. The cannabis segment demonstrated resilience with 16.5% revenue growth in Q4, bolstered by the Indiva acquisition, making SNDL the largest manufacturer of infused edibles in Canada. Cannabis retail revenue reached $83.2 million with 6.3% same-store sales growth. However, challenges persist in the liquor segment, which declined 3.4%, reflecting broader market headwinds. The company reported a $67.2 million net loss in Q4 due to a noncash fair value adjustment on its SunStream investment. Management projects flat liquor revenue growth for 2025. Despite near-term obstacles, SNDL maintains a strong balance sheet with $218 million in unrestricted cash and zero debt.
